name: myco:author-and-debug-agent-pipeline-tasks
description: Use this skill when authoring, configuring, or debugging Myco agent pipeline tasks. It covers task YAML anatomy, scheduling, parameter injection, timeout and concurrency behavior, audit-log interpretation, turn-budget failures, skill-lifecycle task constraints, and hardening patterns for new tasks and MCP tools. Apply it whenever work touches `src/agent/tasks/`, `src/agent/executor.ts`, `src/daemon/task-scheduler.ts`, or `src/mcp/tools/`, even if the user does not explicitly mention task authoring.
